headline: EQT’s New Digital Infrastructure Fund And What It Means For Valuation
summary: EQT (NYSE:EQT) has launched EQT Infrastructure VII, a new multi billion euro fund targeting €21b. The fund is focused on digital economy assets such as AI driven data centers and fiber networks. The launch comes as institutional investors show heightened interest in digital and AI infrastructure. EQT, trading at $54.68, has seen mixed share price moves, with the stock down 2.7% over the past week and down 6.8% over the past month, while still up 2.3% year to date. headline: Inside Alts: EQT's Salata says AI infrastructure buildout has years to run
summary: CNBC Senior Finance and Banking Reporter Leslie Picker speaks with EQT Group Chair Jean Eric Salata about the AI infrastructure boom, the firm's U.S. ambitions and Europe's tech future.
